meaning: n.广播,播音v.播撒(种子),广播 (无线电或电视)广播 播送,播放
examples: The speech was broadcast via a satellite link.
The concert will be broadcast live by the BBC.
Mr Entwistle had said the report had gone through management and legal checks before broadcast.
He earned a degree in broadcast journalism from Brooklyn College and also attended Louisiana State University.
